arts.ttl: Diogo Jota reveals conversation with Kostas Tsimikas seconds before instant impact
arts.sum: Diogo Jota and Kostas Tsimikas were bought on as second-half substitutes and needed just over 20 seconds before they combined to score Liverpool's equaliser at Nottingham Forest

arts.sum: Substitutes Diogo Jota and Kostas Tsimikas were the heroes for Liverpool against Nottingham Forest after a genius Arne Slot decision

arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp laughed off questions over Trent Alexander-Arnold's defending during his Liverpool tenure - and still does - but his issues remain and were exposed at Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: Football fans all use the same word about Murillo in his standout Nottingham Forest display vs Liverpool

arts.ttl: Liverpool fans now want to sign ‘absolutely ridiculous’ Nottingham Forest player after City Ground draw
arts.sum: Liverpool fans have called on their club to sign one of Nottingham Forest’s star players in wake of a top performance in their 1-1 draw...

arts.ttl: Diogo Jota rescues draw for Liverpool against impressive Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Chris Wood had given second-placed Forest the lead.

arts.ttl: 'I've heard a lot' - Steve McManaman makes Trent Alexander-Arnold Liverpool contract claim
